description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for Google Cloud Platform App Engine. Tracks HTTP performance, instance management, network I/O, memcache, task queues, and cost-related metrics collected via the GCP Cloud Monitoring (Stackdriver) or OpenTelemetry receiver.
title: GCP App Engine Overview

864bf76f-2c89-4f1c-9ccb-c5998dc4e9e0.description: GCP Project ID for filtering App Engine metrics
864bf76f-2c89-4f1c-9ccb-c5998dc4e9e0.name: gcp_project
864bf76f-2c89-4f1c-9ccb-c5998dc4e9e0.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'gcp_project'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%appengine%'

1a66a5bb-3c09-4cc1-80c4-df1d2b622d02.description: Deployment environment for filtering App Engine metrics
1a66a5bb-3c09-4cc1-80c4-df1d2b622d02.name: deployment.environment
1a66a5bb-3c09-4cc1-80c4-df1d2b622d02.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%appengine%'

5c8b0488-a98d-428c-b608-d30d1262d6a3.description: App Engine version ID for filtering metrics
5c8b0488-a98d-428c-b608-d30d1262d6a3.name: version_id
5c8b0488-a98d-428c-b608-d30d1262d6a3.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'version_id'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%appengine%'

widgets.description: Current number of active App Engine instances serving traffic.
widgets.title: Active Instances

widgets.description: Total number of HTTP requests received by the App Engine application.
widgets.title: Request Count

widgets.description: Percentage of HTTP responses with 5xx status codes indicating server errors.
widgets.title: Error Rate (%)

widgets.description: Average HTTP response latency across all App Engine requests.
widgets.title: Avg Response Time

widgets.description: Rate of HTTP requests per second broken down by App Engine version.
widgets.title: Request Rate by Version

widgets.description: HTTP response latency percentiles (p50, p95, p99) for App Engine requests.
widgets.title: Response Latency (p50/p95/p99)

widgets.description: Rate of HTTP responses broken down by response status code.
widgets.title: Error Rate by Response Code

widgets.description: Rate of HTTP requests broken down by App Engine request handler.
widgets.title: Requests by Handler

widgets.description: Percentage of HTTP responses with 4xx client error status codes over time.
widgets.title: 4xx Error Rate

widgets.description: Percentage of HTTP responses with 5xx server error status codes over time.
widgets.title: 5xx Error Rate

widgets.description: Number of App Engine instances over time, grouped by version and state (active, idle).
widgets.title: Instance Count Over Time

widgets.description: Memory usage in bytes per App Engine instance over time.
widgets.title: Memory Usage per Instance

widgets.description: CPU usage rate per App Engine instance, measured in CPU seconds per second.
widgets.title: CPU Utilization per Instance

widgets.description: App Engine instance loading request latency, indicating cold start performance.
widgets.title: Instance Startup Latency

widgets.description: Rate of outbound network bytes sent from App Engine instances.
widgets.title: Network Bytes Sent

widgets.description: Rate of inbound network bytes received by App Engine instances.
widgets.title: Network Bytes Received

widgets.description: Combined send and receive network bandwidth per App Engine version.
widgets.title: Bandwidth per Version

widgets.description: Rate of HTTP connections to App Engine, split by whether the request triggered instance loading.
widgets.title: Connection Count

widgets.description: Percentage of memcache lookups that resulted in a cache hit. Higher is better.
widgets.title: Memcache Hit Ratio

widgets.description: Rate of memcache operations split by hits and misses per second.
widgets.title: Memcache Operations/sec

widgets.description: Current memory used by memcache service in bytes.
widgets.title: Memcache Used Size

widgets.description: Current number of items stored in the App Engine memcache.
widgets.title: Memcache Item Count

widgets.description: Number of tasks waiting in each App Engine task queue.
widgets.title: Task Queue Depth

widgets.description: Rate of task executions per second from App Engine task queues.
widgets.title: Task Execution Rate

widgets.description: Rate of task retries per second indicating tasks that failed and were rescheduled.
widgets.title: Task Retry Count

widgets.description: Average age of oldest tasks in App Engine task queues, indicating processing lag.
widgets.title: Task Age

widgets.description: Number of active instances over time, directly proportional to billed instance hours.
widgets.title: Billable Instance Hours

widgets.description: Rate of API calls broken down by version and handler, useful for quota monitoring.
widgets.title: API Calls by Service

widgets.description: Distribution of App Engine HTTP responses by type (dynamic vs static content).
widgets.title: Response Type Distribution

widgets.description: Average HTTP response latency broken down by App Engine handler to identify slow endpoints.
widgets.title: Latency by Handler

widgets.description: Rate of HTTP requests broken down by HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.).
widgets.title: Request Count by HTTP Method

widgets.description: Response latency percentiles per App Engine version to compare performance across deployments.
widgets.title: Latency by Version (p50/p90)

widgets.description: Current total memory usage across all active App Engine instances.
widgets.title: Total Memory Usage

widgets.description: Maximum CPU usage across all App Engine instances during the selected time window.
widgets.title: Peak CPU Usage

widgets.description: Number of distinct App Engine versions with active instances.
widgets.title: Active Versions

widgets.description: Combined rate of inbound and outbound network traffic across all App Engine instances.
widgets.title: Total Network I/O Rate

widgets.description: Average memory usage per App Engine version over time.
widgets.title: Memory Usage by Version

widgets.description: CPU usage rate per App Engine version over time.
widgets.title: CPU Usage by Version

widgets.description: App Engine instance distribution by state (active, idle, starting) over time.
widgets.title: Instances by State

widgets.description: Average CPU usage per active instance, indicating how efficiently instances are being utilized.
widgets.title: CPU per Instance (Efficiency)

widgets.description: Percentage of available memcache capacity currently in use.
widgets.title: Memcache Utilization (%)

widgets.description: Rate of memcache evictions per second. High eviction rates indicate insufficient cache capacity.
widgets.title: Memcache Evictions

widgets.description: Overall HTTP request rate trend for capacity planning and quota monitoring.
widgets.title: Request Rate Trend

widgets.description: Detailed breakdown of instance hours by version and state for cost attribution.
widgets.title: Instance Hours by Version & State

widgets.description: Calculated service availability percentage based on the ratio of non-5xx to total responses. Target is typically 99.9% or higher.
widgets.title: Service Availability (%)

widgets.description: Average number of requests handled per instance, useful for understanding scaling efficiency.
widgets.title: Throughput per Instance
